subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Lord of all necks unto him who hath believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful. Verily, He guideth His servants unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الرقاب لمن آمن بالله العزیز الوهاب انه یهدی العباد الی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement
